title: LuLu Group airlifts 80,000kg of Indian produce to UAE to keep supermarket shelves stocked
summary_full: Dedicated cargo flights are delivering fresh produce to the UAE as regional aviation disruptions impact traditional supply routes. Retailers are arranging special shipments from overseas to ensure supermarket shelves remain stocked with fruits, vegetables, and other perishables, maintaining steady supplies for residents.
